horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: For Aries, Sun, Moon and rising, the second week will bring more charm and healing as Venus will be moving through the first house. You will have noticeable boost in your charm, confidence, and your personal appeal will increase, People around you will respond more positively to your presence, so the social interactions will produce good results. You will update your appearance, refine your goals, so, health and wellbeing be the first priority. Single Aries natives will have the closest time to find someone special but there is nothing called soul mates or twin flames in astrology, so please be realistic in the relationships, and don’t expect anything from anyone. This Venus will make you have personal initiatives, presentations, or meetings for business purpose too.

At the same time the Sun, Mercury and Mars are in the twelfth house, and Mercury is retrograding there, so you will have an inward focus towards unfinished matters. You will feel like taking a small break, so that you can review your plans, and make some new plans based on the past events. Mercury retrograde will bring technical glitches, old friends, past conversations or ideas back into focus, but you should not be in a hurry to start anything new. The Sun and Mars will increase the mental activity, and it can make you a bit restless.

As per the tropical zodiac, Jupiter will be moving direct in Cancer from this week onwards, so that will bring forward shift in the home, and family matters. You will start making plans related to house improvements, relocation, or you will meet some family members through family gatherings. You can expect positive developments, involving family support, property discussions, or there will be a birth or marriage in the family. This is a very good transit, as the health of every family member will show progress.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: The second week of March will witness Jupiter direct motion in Cancer, which is going to impact your third house. This transit will be a big relief for your daily life, as you were having a lot of instability in the past few days. This Jupiter will bring some response to an application, or you will get response for a pending message. You will also have healthy discussion with your siblings, or close relatives, and the outcome will be good. Since Jupiter indicates studies, and third house also indicates the same, you will have the closest opportunities to attend learning and training sessions. There will be more short trips, which can be work related or to visit your relatives, or there will be more online and offline meetings.

Your ruler Venus will be moving through the twelfth house, so you will be spending more money for personal comfort, medical checkups, traveling, or for something which is not necessary. Some of those expenses can come up suddenly, and without prior planning, and you need to foresee them You will also choose to be away from large gatherings, so that you can be peaceful and happier. There will be some updates from the foreign land about travelling or visa processing.

The Sun, Mercury and Mars are moving the eleventh house, and Mercury is retrograding here, so you will meet some friends after a long time. Mercury retrogression will bring technical issues, communication problems, and travel blocks, so you have to take care of these. There will be delay in the updates, you can expect sudden change in the plans, so you have to double-check schedules, online meetings and shared documents. There will be more activity with friends, but arguments also can come up. You may also get an opportunity to join a new team, but please cross check how genuine they are.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: The second week of March will bring visible developments in career as Venus is moving through the fire sign of Aries. This move will bring invitation for various gatherings, networking meetings, or social events where useful contracts will come up. You will find new people through mutual friends, who will discuss business opportunities for collaborative projects. There will be financial gain through team work, and you will get commissions, or shared projects will appear. You will also spend more time in social media, group chars, or professional networks. This is also the closest time for single Gemini natives to find someone special.

The Sun, Mercury, and Mars are moving through the tenth house, so you will have more activity at work. Mercury is retrograde in this same house, so you will have some issues in the projects, as Mercury retrograde will bring technical issues, communication problems, or travel blocks. You will attend meetings with supervisors, clients, or managers, and they will discuss about targets and deadlines with you. There will be increase in the workload, but Mercury can delay your projects. You may get a new job but make sure this offer may not be always genuine. During this time, you may also hear from former employer, client or professional contract, so there are chances to get a previous job opportunity.

The Goodnews of this week is Jupiter direct in the water sign of Cancer, and that will improve your financial matters. You will receive delated payments, salary adjustments, or there will be new discussions about income. Since Jupiter is the planet for expansion so, you will get more money through additional tasks, freelance work, or side projects. You will also spend time in organising bills, banking matters, or budgeting upcoming expenses. However, you need to control your food habits, otherwise you can get some health issues.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: For Cancer Sun, Moon and rising natives will have the closest opportunities to get a new job, as Venus is moving through the tenth house, so you will get attention from the public. There will be meetings with supervisors, clients or senior authorities, and they will notice your work. You will be asked to take up new responsibilities like representing a team, attend and official gatherings, or taking part in a discussion. Some people may update their resumes, job profiles, apply for new roles, or attend interviews. There will be a pleasant interaction with your managers, and the workplace will have a better environment. You will also spend time in preparing documents, presentations, or reports connected to your career.

The Sun, Mercury and Mars are moving through the ninth house, and Mercury retrograde is also in the same house. You will book tickets, discuss visa applications, or communicate with universities, about courses and certifications. However, Mercury retrograde can bring delays in getting approvals, travels, responses, or in documentations. You will have to cross check your communications, projects, and every work before submission, as there are chances for possible errors. There will be some arguments with your teachers, mentors, but this is a good time for those who are planning to write back papers.

Jupiter the planet for magnification and luck, and it is moving through your sign, and it will turn direct in this week. This direct mode will bring relief in the personal life, so there will be more motivation. Some of you will start new fitness routines, update the wardrobe, or make visible changes in appearance. You will also finalise personal plans, like starting a new business idea, initiating a purchase, or announcing a decision to your family members. There will be some opportunities for real estate deals, and home improvement projects too.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: The second week of March will bring significant events in the matters of travelling and studies, as Venus is moving through the ninth house. You will surely make some plans for long distance travel, higher studies, or professional training, so this is going to be a very busy week. Some of you will book tickets, apply for new courses, write articles, so got spiritual meetings, or attend seminars and workshops. There will be a close interaction with people from the foreign lands, and you will surely get some benefits through them. Single Leo, Sun, Moon and rising sign natives will have the closest opportunities to find someone special.

The Sun, Mars and Mercury are impacting the eighth house, so it will bring some attention to shared resources and official paperwork. You will handle matters related to taxes, insurance, loans or credit card, or financial settlements. This transit will bring attention towards pending payments, and repayment also will be your priority, but this is not a great time to start new investments as Mercury is retrograding, and that will bring confusion. This retrograde will bring technical glitches, communication issues and travel blocks too, so, you will have to be careful whatever talks you have regarding finances. There will be unexpected expenses, which can be a bit stressful.

The planet for luck and expansion, Jupiter will turn direct in your twelfth house, and it will slowly bring some events connected to hospital visits, medical treatments, or health checkups which were delayed. The twelfth house indicates long trips, so that can also happen during this week. You will also spend time in silent environments, while completing some tasks, which needs privacy, such as research work, planning documents, or confidential discussions. This transit also will make you visit people who live in isolated places like hospitals, or monasteries.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: For Virgo Sun, Moon and rising sign natives the second week of March will be all about long-term planning as Jupiter the planet for luck and finances will turn direct in your eleventh house. You will get invitations to professional gatherings, networking events, or community meetings, where people will listen carefully to your words. Friends or elder siblings will give you new ideas, side projects or they will invite you to have shared investments. You will also connect with an old friend or professional contact, who will introduce you to a useful opportunity. This transit also will bring charity programs, foreign collaborations or work with big companies.

Venus is moving through Aries, and it is impacting your finances, joint responsibilities, and partnerships. You will take part in discussions about loans, insurance, taxes or some kind of financial plan with your partner. Venus in the eighth house is good as it will give you some money like reimbursements, pending payments, settlements or shared investments. During this week, you will review your financial agreements, or you will update important documents. There will be in-depth conversations with your spouse, or partner, which can help you in solving the issues. There will be some healing programs like therapies or consultation with a psychologist too.

Your ruler Mercury is in retrogression in Pisces, and the Sun and Mars are also there, so your relationship sector is activated, but not in a very positive way. If you have any relationship issues, then it can get aggravated during this time, so this is not the right time to impose your ideas on your spouse. This is also not the right time to sign business documents, but if you are very particular about it, then you should review the document carefully. You may also meet your ex, or old friends during this time.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: The second week of March will witness a focus on your workplace, but there will be a lot of work , hence there will be work pressure. You will attend more meetings, complete pending work and manage deadlines which require immediate attention. There will be some arguments at work, as the Sun and Mars are natural malefic, so you will have to be very careful. Since Mercury is retrograde so that will bring technical glitches, communication problems and errors in the projects. You will have to rework in some tasks, due to missing information or sudden changes. You will also go for some health check-ups, and you will have to take your health seriously.

Venus is moving through your seventh house, as it is moving through Aries, so there will be a lot of meetings with partners, clients and close associates. You may also get new business deals, but please cross check the document before you sign them as Mercury retrograde can bring some errors and confusion. This Venus will also bring social gatherings, celebrations and your presence will get noticed. Single Libra Sun, Moon and rising natives have the closes time to find someone special, but this is not the time to end a relationship.

Jupiter, the planet for expansion and magnification, is in the tenth house, which will surely bring new opportunities, but the only problem is Mercury retrograde. Your management will have important announcements, so you have to be alert to not miss them. Job seekers will hear back from companies regarding the interviews or applications that were pending earlier. Business owners will get new clients, and they will also try to revive their business, so events like revamping the website, or social media marketing can also happen. This is a time to get personal recognition, official meetings, and better team work also can happen.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: For Scorpio, the second week of March will bring improvements in the health matters as Venus is moving through the sixth house. You will also handle more practical responsibilities at work. This transit will make you work in coordination with your colleagues, and you will be able to solve the issues at work. You will receive new task assignments, attend training sessions, or reorganise your daily schedule to handle increasing workload. When Venus is moving through the sixth house some people will spend money for health checkups, fitness memberships, or routine medical needs. Some of you will spend more time with your pets or adopt new ones.

The Sun, Mars, and Mercury retrograde is moving through the fifth house, so you will spend more time in learning new skills which can be creative and academic. You will work hard in setting up a new business, but that will not be easy, and some of your ideas can be a flop during this Mercury retrogression, so it’s wise to postpone them until Mercury retrogression is over. It will be good if you review your plans than execute them. Parents will deal with school related matters with children, including meetings and solving their issues. Love life also can go through some issues, and your ex may appear.

Jupiter will start its direct motion in the ninth house, so there will be a lot of movement, and activities regarding education, legal matters, and long-distance communications. You will finally receive responses regarding visa, university applications, or professional certifications. Jupiter itself is the planet for foreign collaborations, so there will be long distance travels, you will reconnect with mentors, and there will be learning sessions. You will also get multiple opportunities to write and publish your articles. Spiritual matters will also be prominent, and that will you make very strong too.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: For Sagittarius, the second week of March witness visible changes in your love lie, as Venus is moving through the fifth house of romance. There are chances for single archers to go on dates, attend social gatherings and through such events they will find attractive people. Sagittarius Sun, Moon, rising natives will buy items related to hobbies or spend money on children, or spend more time with youngsters in your area. The fifth house also indicates business ventures, and some of you will try to pitch in new business ideas, but this is not the right time for that as Venus can make you a bit careless.

Transit Jupiter will be direct in Cancer, which is good news for every Sagittarius, as Jupiter is your ruler. This transit will support you in financial matters, or legal transactions involving shared money. You will meet financial consultants, sign loan documents, discuss insurance plans, or handle tax related work. This Jupiter also will bring some pending payments, refunds, partner contributions or unexpected financial support. The eighth house indicates partnerships from personal and professional settings so you will have important conversations with your partner regarding the longevity of the relationship and money as well.

The Sun, Mercury and Mars are moving through Pisces, which rules your fourth house, and Mercury is retrograde. This is the time for clutter clearing, repairing, and renovation at home, so you will spend more time there. However, this is not the right time to start a new real estate deal, as Mercury is retrograding. During Mercury retrograde, there will be technical issues, and confusion, so it will be good if you postpone the fresh real estate deals until Mercury moves direct. There are chances for arguments at home, and the elders at home need special care. You will meet your old friends, and family members too.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: Venus is moving through the fourth house, as it is in the fire sign of Aries, so you will spend more time in beautifying your home. You will clean rooms, move furniture, or buy home décor, or call up a cleaning agency to give your house a clean look. There will be some family gatherings, and people will happily visit with you, and there will be peace than ever before. Venus is a natural benefic, so, you can expect some invite to attend family events or some of your friends may invite you to attend parties at their home.

Jupiter the planet for luck and finances will start its direct motion in Cancer during this week, and this will be a master stroke for your progress. For the past few months, you were not getting any new contracts, but you will get them from this week onwards. You will attend meetings with business partners, clients or your spouse, to discuss the progress. Some of you will sign new business agreements or offer letter, start new collaborations, or go for long trips for the new projects. There will be social gatherings, which can be marriage, birthday parties or business meets too.

The Sun, Mercury and Mars will impact the third house, so your schedule can get distracted as Mercury is retrograde. When Mercury is retrograde, you will have technical issues, communication problem and delays. You will move around more than usual, but it can be very tiring too as there will be nearby meetings, visiting shops, and offices, for document corrections. Mercury retrograde will cause delays in messages, lost emails, or repeated conversations with coworkers. You will meet with your siblings, and there will be some serious issues to discuss with them. The neck to shoulder area will be very sensitive, and you will have to take care of that.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: For Aquarius Sun, Moon and rising signs will have a lot of work, as Venus is moving through Aries, and this busy schedule started last week. During this week, you will have a lot of short travel, and meet people online and offline. You will send many messages, make phone calls, or visit siblings or neighbours so get ready to go through a busy time. This is also a very good time to get projects from writing, teaching and publishing, and you will also go for workshops. The third house indicates neck to shoulder area, so if you had some issues here, it can reappear.

Your financial matters will be a bit sensitive as the Sun, Mercury and Mars are moving through the second house, and Mercury is in retrograde. Since Mercury is retrograde, this is not the right to start new investment or new financial transactions. You will withdraw cash, pay bills, visit banks, or review your bank statements. During this transit you will also take some money to support someone. Mercury retrogression will bring technical issues, and confusion, so make sure you don’t take up any additional risks. Please take care of your food habits, otherwise there are chances for dietary issues.

Jupiter will start its direct mode in Cancer, so you will spend more time at work as it is moving through the sixth house. You will get new task at work, or there will be attending some workshops. There will be some physical activities at work, so you need to travel between locations, departments and offices. You will spend more time for health care practices, so some of you will visit doctors, take up new diet, or start new wellness habits. There are huge chances for new job opportunities, better atmosphere at workplace too.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting March 8
content: The second week of March will bring more focus on your personal life as this is the solar return time for Pisces Sun signs. You will be busy with personal projects, image makeover, and direct interactions with people. However, this is a complex time as Mercury is retrograde in your sign, which can bring arguments with people around you. You may also get some calls, or messages from your ex, but this is not the time for decision making, but this is the time to review your personal life, so that you can take up some initiatives when Mercury turn direct.

Venus is moving through the second house, and money matters will be your priority. You will handle cash, new bills, visit banks, or check financial matters. The second house indicates food, so you may feel like eating more but you should control your food habits. Some of you may frequently order food online, but that will cause health issues during this time. The second house indicates facial area so, you will try to buy some cosmetic products to improve your beauty, or you will go for dental treatment too. There will be some chances to get a new job as well.

Jupiter, your ruler is moving through your fifth house, so your children will have significant events in their life. It can be like them attending exams, attending new courses, or even getting a new job. Single Pisces natives will get the closest opportunities to find a partner, but this is not the time to take and give such commitments, so wait until Mercury moves in direct mode. You will also try to make some business plans with your creative skills. It will be good if you avoid high-risk financial decisions, as there are chances for potential losses.
